name: Down Range Indoor Golf Simulator
about: Down Range Indoor Golf Simulator is a premier indoor golf facility in Sedalia, Missouri, offering year-round play in a comfortable, temperature-controlled single bay. The venue provides access to hundreds of world-famous courses, along with a variety of interactive games like Barrels, Darts, Biathlon, Bridges, Miniature Golf, and Battlefield, and also features a separate Laser Shot shooting simulator. Pricing is based on bay rental, with options ranging from 30 to 240 minutes, and membership plans are available for frequent players, offering monthly hours and discounts. It is ideal for golfers looking for a private, uncrowded experience to practice, play, or enjoy social gaming with friends.
why_golfers_like_it: Entire single-bay rental for a private, uncrowded experience
Premium Uneekor Eye XO overhead launch monitor for instant shot feedback
Variety of games and challenges beyond traditional course play
Flexible rental times accommodating groups up to four

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service; may allow outside food (BYOB not mentioned for alcohol).
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: Overhead launch monitor providing instant shot feedback; accommodates both driving range and course play.

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state whether club rentals are available; guests are advised to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No information is provided on food and drink policies; BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Please allow about an hour and a half for 18 holes of golf per person.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as fun for all ages, including interactive shooting and golf games suitable for children.
